This report maps repo-local toolset YAML files to body-free git provenance. It reports tool refs, config-gating counts, risk codes, hashes, tracked state, dirty state, last commit IDs/dates, and commit-subject hashes only; raw toolset YAML, toolset instructions, tool outputs, issue bodies, comments, prompts, git subjects, author identities, provider payloads, and secret values are not included.
